semantics.snapshot: Mutable in-season 40-man roster membership captured team by team; every output row carries the source page retrieval timestamp in known_at.
semantics.active: is_active is the normalized Baseball-Reference #the40man is_active field and identifies the active MLB roster at retrieval time.
semantics.injuredList: is_dl is the normalized Baseball-Reference #the40man is_dl field and identifies an injured-list designation at retrieval time.
semantics.globalSourceLockIsolation: This reference protocol and its generated snapshot lock do not modify data/source-lock.json.
